title: hyper's frame master
description: master your framing and composition using these overlays! 💪🏻
body:
master your composition & framing with this mod! render a multitude of different overlays serving as guidelines for compositional rules.

includes the following:

- rule of thirds
- phi grid
- golden spiral

you can switch between these overlays as well as the golden spiral's flip mode using two custom keybinds!
